zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joyce Tibetot於1430年1月出生在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特時，她的父親John Tibetot60歲，母親Joyce Cherleton26歲。她於1459年與Sir Edmund Sutton在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年10月18日在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joyce Tibetot于1430年1月出生在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特时，她的父亲John Tibetot60岁，母亲Joyce Cherleton26岁。她于1459年与Sir Edmund Sutton在英国武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年10月18日在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joyce Tibetot was born in January 1430, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, her father, John Tibetot, was 60 and her mother, Joyce Cherleton, was 26. She married Sir Edmund Sutton in 1459, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 18 October 1485, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joyce Tibetot est née en janvier 1430, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Tibetot, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Joyce Cherleton, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund Sutton en 1459, à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 octobre 1485, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joyce Tibetot im Januar 1430 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Tibetot 60 und ihre Mutter Joyce Cherleton 26. Sie hat 1459 in Worcestershire, England Sir Edmund Sutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Oktober 1485 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Dudley, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joyce Tibetot è nata il nel gennaio 1430 nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, John Tibetot, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Joyce Cherleton, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edmund Sutton nel 1459, nel Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1485, nel Dudley, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joyce Tibetotが1430年1月にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで生まれた時，父John Tibetotは60歳，母Joyce Cherletonは26歳であった。1459年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでSir Edmund Suttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年10月18日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joyce Tibetot(이)가 1430년 1월 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Tibetot(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce Cherleton(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 워스스터실르에서 Sir Edmund Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 10월 18일 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joyce Tibetot nasceu em janeiro de 1430, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Tibetot, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Joyce Cherleton, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edmund Sutton em 1459, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1485, em Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joyce Tibetot родилась январь 1430 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Tibetot было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce Cherleton, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund Sutton в 1459 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 октября 1485 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joyce Tibetot nació en enero de 1430, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Tibetot, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Joyce Cherleton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Edmund Sutton en 1459, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1485, en Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
